steps.title: Spot the physical motion
steps.content: Mrs. Wilkins is sitting and extending her arm toward a bowl of oranges to grab one. The phrase “reaching across to” describes the physical action of stretching one's limbs toward something.

steps.title: Match the movement to the choice
steps.content:
Choice C, “Stretching toward,” directly expresses the action of extending one's arm or body toward an object.

A, B, and D don't fit: joining with suggests association, gaining on suggests catching up, and arriving at suggests reaching a destination.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
